---
title: "CV"
description: "Curriculum vitae."
---

Download the latest CV:

[Download CV](assets/cv/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

## Snapshot

**Rahul Manavalan**  
Doctoral student in mathematical statistics / scientific computing.

### Interests

Scientific computing, numerical analysis, inverse problems, PDEs, kernel methods, uncertainty quantification.

### Education

- PhD studies, Mathematical Statistics, Lund University.
- MSc, Computational Science and Engineering, Technical University of Munich.
- B.Tech, Mechanical Engineering.

### Links

- GitHub: <https://github.com/AllThingsDynamical>
- Email: `your.email@example.com`
